'''鈭歵-w-dh-w''' ('''katawdhewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:run|run]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-w-dh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:run|run]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-w-dh-w
|-
! Lemma
| katawdhewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitawdhewoko|thitawdhewoko]] || [[word:jitawdhewoko|jitawdhewoko]] || [[word:shitawdhewoko|shitawdhewoko]] || [[word:kitawdhewoko|kitawdhewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutawdhewoko|thuthutawdhewoko]] || [[word:jujutawdhewoko|jujutawdhewoko]] || [[word:shushutawdhewoko|shushutawdhewoko]] || [[word:kukutawdhewoko|kukutawdhewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutawdhewoko|thutawdhewoko]] || [[word:jutawdhewoko|jutawdhewoko]] || [[word:shutawdhewoko|shutawdhewoko]] || [[word:kutawdhewoko|kutawdhewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutawdhewoko|thutawdhewoko]] || [[word:jutawdhewoko|jutawdhewoko]] || [[word:shutawdhewoko|shutawdhewoko]] || [[word:kutawdhewoko|kutawdhewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetawdhewoko|thetawdhewoko]] || [[word:jetawdhewoko|jetawdhewoko]] || [[word:shetawdhewoko|shetawdhewoko]] || [[word:ketawdhewoko|ketawdhewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotawdhewoko|thothotawdhewoko]] || [[word:jojotawdhewoko|jojotawdhewoko]] || [[word:shoshotawdhewoko|shoshotawdhewoko]] || [[word:kokotawdhewoko|kokotawdhewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotawdhewoko|thotawdhewoko]] || [[word:jotawdhewoko|jotawdhewoko]] || [[word:shotawdhewoko|shotawdhewoko]] || [[word:kotawdhewoko|kotawdhewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotawdhewoko|thotawdhewoko]] || [[word:jotawdhewoko|jotawdhewoko]] || [[word:shotawdhewoko|shotawdhewoko]] || [[word:kotawdhewoko|kotawdhewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙tawdhewoko|th忙tawdhewoko]] || [[word:j忙tawdhewoko|j忙tawdhewoko]] || [[word:sh忙tawdhewoko|sh忙tawdhewoko]] || [[word:k忙tawdhewoko|k忙tawdhewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatawdhewoko|thathatawdhewoko]] || [[word:jajatawdhewoko|jajatawdhewoko]] || [[word:shashatawdhewoko|shashatawdhewoko]] || [[word:kakatawdhewoko|kakatawdhewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatawdhewoko|thatawdhewoko]] || [[word:jatawdhewoko|jatawdhewoko]] || [[word:shatawdhewoko|shatawdhewoko]] || [[word:katawdhewoko|katawdhewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatawdhewoko|thatawdhewoko]] || [[word:jatawdhewoko|jatawdhewoko]] || [[word:shatawdhewoko|shatawdhewoko]] || [[word:katawdhewoko|katawdhewoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shatawdhewithi|shatawdhewithi]] || [[word:shatawdhewiji|shatawdhewiji]] || [[word:shatawdhewishi|shatawdhewishi]] || [[word:shatawdhewiki|shatawdhewiki]]
